debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M : Set β
P : WList α β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
h : @Graph.IsAugPath α β M G hM P
⊢ V(G, M) ⊆ V(G, symmDiff M P.edgeSet)

failed_attempts:
intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, he, hve⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ E(P)
  · -- e is in the path, so v is an internal vertex of P (not first or last)
    -- Since v is matched and P is augmenting, v must be incident to another edge in P
    have hv_not_first : v ≠ P.first := fun hvf ↦ h.first_not_in (hvf ▸ hv)
    have hv_not_last : v ≠ P.last := fun hvl ↦ h.last_not_in (hvl ▸ hv)
    obtain ⟨f, hfP, hfv, hef⟩ := h.toIsPath.exists_other_inc_of_mem_vertex_ne_first_last 
      (h.toIsPath.edgeSet_subset heP hve) hv_not_first hv_not_last
    by_cases hfM : f ∈ M
    · exact ⟨f, Or.inl ⟨hfM, hfP⟩, hfv⟩
    · exact ⟨f, Or.inr ⟨hfP, hfM⟩, hfv⟩
  · exact ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨he, heP⟩, hve⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, he, hve⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ E(P)
  · -- e is in P, so v is an interior vertex of P and has another edge in M ∆ E(P)
    have hne_first : v ≠ P.first := fun hvf ↦ h.first_not_in (hvf ▸ hv)
    have hne_last : v ≠ P.last := fun hvl ↦ h.last_not_in (hvl ▸ hv)
    obtain ⟨f, hfP, hfv, hfne⟩ := h.toIsPath.exists_other_edge_of_mem_vertex 
      (h.toIsPath.edgeSet_subset_edge heP hve) hne_first hne_last
    have hfM : f ∉ M := by
      by_contra hfM'
      exact hM.disjoint he hfM' hfne.symm |>.notMem_of_mem_left hve hfv
    exact ⟨f, Or.inr ⟨hfP, hfM⟩, hfv⟩
  · exact ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨he, heP⟩, hve⟩

intro v ⟨e, he, hve⟩
  by_cases heP : e ∈ E(P)
  · exact ⟨e, mem_symmDiff.mpr (Or.inl ⟨he, heP⟩), hve⟩
  · exact ⟨e, mem_symmDiff.mpr (Or.inl ⟨he, heP⟩), hve⟩

    exact ⟨f, Or.inr ⟨hfP, hfM⟩, hfv⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, he, hve⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ E(P)
  · -- e is in P, so v is on the path
    have hvP : v ∈ V(P) := h.toIsPath.edgeSet_subset_inc heP hve
    -- v is not an endpoint since v ∈ V(G, M)
    have hv_not_first : v ≠ P.first := fun hvf ↦ h.first_not_in (hvf ▸ hv)
    have hv_not_last : v ≠ P.last := fun hvl ↦ h.last_not_in (hvl ▸ hv)
    -- v is an interior vertex, so has degree 2 in P
    obtain ⟨e', he'P, hve', hne'⟩ := h.toIsPath.exists_other_edge_of_mem_vertex 
      hvP hv_not_first hv_not_last heP hve
    -- By alternating property, exactly one of e, e' is in M
    have : e' ∉ M := by
      intro he'M
      exact hM.disjoint he he'M hne'.symm |>.notMem_of_mem_left hve hve'
    exact ⟨e', Or.inr ⟨h.toIsPath.edge_subset he'P, this⟩, hve'⟩
  · exact ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨he, heP⟩, hve⟩

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, he, hve⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ E(P)
  · -- e is in P, so v is on the path. Since v ∈ V(G,M), v is not first or last.

    have hvP : v ∈ V(P) := ⟨e, heP, hve⟩
    have hvfirst : v ≠ P.first := fun hvf ↦ h.first_not_in (hvf ▸ hv)
    have hvlast : v ≠ P.last := fun hvl ↦ h.last_not_in (hvl ▸ hv)
    obtain ⟨f, hfP, hfv, hfe⟩ := h.toIsPath.exists_other_edge_of_mem hvP hvfirst hvlast heP
    have hfM : f ∉ M := by
      by_contra hfM'
      exact hM.disjoint he hfM' hfe.symm |>.notMem_of_mem_left hve hfv
    exact ⟨f, Or.inr ⟨hfP, hfM⟩, hfv⟩

    have hvne : v ≠ P.first ∧ v ≠ P.last := ⟨fun hf => h.first_not_in (hf ▸ hv),

    obtain ⟨f, hfP, hfv, hef⟩ := h.toIsPath.toIsWalk.exists_edge_of_mem_vertexSet_not_endpoint hvinP hvne.1 hvne.2
    refine ⟨f, ?_, hfv⟩
    simp only [symmDiff_def, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_diff]
    by_cases hfM : f ∈ M
    · exfalso
      exact (hM.disjoint he hfM hef).notMem_of_mem_left hev hfv
    · exact Or.inr ⟨hfP, hfM⟩
  · exact ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨he, heP⟩, hev⟩

  obtain ⟨e, heM, hve⟩ := hv
  by_cases heP : e ∈ E(P)
  · have hv_vertex : v ∈ P.vertex := h.toIsPath.toIsWalk.edgeSet_inc_subset ⟨heP, hve⟩
    have hne_first : v ≠ P.first := fun h' ↦ h.first_not_in (h' ▸ hv)
    have hne_last : v ≠ P.last := fun h' ↦ h.last_not_in (h' ▸ hv)
    obtain ⟨f, hfP, hfv, hef⟩ := h.toIsPath.exists_other_inc_of_mem_vertex hv_vertex hne_first hne_last heP hve
    have hfnM : f ∉ M := fun hfM ↦ (hM.disjoint heM hfM hef).notMem_of_mem_left hve hfv
    exact ⟨f, Or.inr ⟨hfP, hfnM⟩, hfv⟩
  · exact ⟨e, Or.inl ⟨heM, heP⟩, hve⟩
